entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History
entries.value: Tafiyar Lokaci ta AI don Koyon Tarihi

entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Tafiyar Lokaci ta AI don Koyon Tarihi hanya ce mai mayar da hankali ta amfani da AI don koyo maimakon tara amsoshi kawai. An gina yanayin a kan aiki takamaimai: Receive a temporal passport, bayyananne a tafiya advisory, sannan bincika a specific na tarihi society ta hanyar yanayi, taswira, timeline, people, rules, inventory, da shaida.

entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History: practical guide
entries.value: Tafiyar Lokaci ta AI don Koyon Tarihi: jagora mai amfani
Malamin AI don batutuwa masu wahala

entries.value: Malamin AI ga iyaye da iyalai

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Improve essays, stories, emails, and arguments with targeted feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: Kocin Rubutu na AI don Kasidu, Labarai, da Daftari Masu Haske hanya ce mai mayar da hankali ta amfani da AI don koyo maimakon tara amsoshi kawai. An gina yanayin a kan aiki takamaimai: Inganta kasidu, labarai, emails, da hujjoji tare da targeted martani that keeps naka voice intact.
Ra'ayin AI kan rubutu ga dalibai

entries.source: AI writing feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: AI rubutu martani that keeps naka voice intact.

entries.source: All inspir AI learning prompt starters
entries.value: All inspir koyon AI saƙonnin farawa

entries.source: All public AI learning chats in one clear place.
entries.value: All na jama’a koyon AI chats a cikin one bayyananne place.
An yarda a kan shafukan jama’a

entries.source: An AI learning companion should not pretend to be a magic authority. It should not erase uncertainty, replace teachers, or train learners to copy answers. The best systems are honest about limits and clear about the difference between help and handoff.
entries.value: Wani AI abokin koyo bai kamata ya pretend don be a magic ikon tushe. It bai kamata ya erase rashin tabbas, replace malamai, ko train masu koyo don kwafe amsoshi. mafi kyau systems suna gaskiya game da limits da bayyananne game da the difference between taimako da handoff.

entries.value: Wani electronic ko physical signature na the person authorized don act a kan behalf na the owner na the haƙƙa cikin mallaka’s interest; Wani bayani na the copyrighted work that kai ikirari has been infringed, including the URL (i.e., web shafi address) na the location inda the copyrighted work exists ko a kwafe na the copyrighted work; Identification na the URL ko other specific location a kan Service inda the material that kai ikirari shi ne infringing shi ne located; naka address, telephone number, da email address; Wani statement ta kai that kai have a good faith belief that the disputed amfani da ba authorized ta the haƙƙa cikin mallaka owner, its agent, ko the law; a statement ta kai, made under penalty na perjury, that the above information a cikin naka sanarwa shi ne accurate da that kai suna the haƙƙa cikin mallaka owner ko authorized don act a kan the haƙƙa cikin mallaka owner’s behalf.

entries.source: Answer a check question, try a step, debate a claim, revise a draft, or build recall cards.
entries.value: Amsa tambayar dubawa, gwada mataki, yi muhawara kan da'awa, gyara draft, ko gina katunan tuna.

entries.source: Answer the active question in your own words
entries.value: Amsa tambayar da ke gudana da kalmominka

entries.source: Answer the learner directly, then offer two possible paths: simpler foundations or deeper exploration.
entries.value: Amsa the mai koyo directly, sannan offer two possible hanyoyi: simpler foundations ko zurfafa exploration.

entries.value: Any contests, sweepstakes ko other promotions (collectively, “Promotions”) made available ta hanyar Service na iya be governed ta rules that suna separate daga these Terms na Service. If kai participate a cikin any Promotions, please bita the applicable rules as well as namu manufar sirri. If the rules don a Promotion conflict tare da these Terms na Service, Promotion rules zai apply.

entries.source: API, admin, reset, private utility, and private saved-chat surfaces are not public source content.
entries.value: API, admin, reset, na sirri utility, da na sirri saved-chat surfaces ba su na jama’a abun tushe.

entries.source: Applied AI learning work before the current AI wave.
entries.value: Applied koyon AI work kafin the na yanzu AI wave.

entries.source: apply a concept to a small example.
entries.value: apply a ra’ayi don a small example.

entries.source: Apply the idea to a new example.
entries.value: Apply the ra’ayi don a sabo example.

entries.source: Are audience pages public and indexable?
entries.value: Shin masu amfani shafuka na jama’a da mai iya shiga index?

entries.source: Are private saved user conversations exposed to search?
entries.value: Shin na sirri tattaunawar masu amfani da aka adana exposed don bincike?
Shin na jama’a hirarrakin baƙo mai iya shiga index?
Shin tambayoyi da katunan tunatarwa included?
Shin tambayoyin gwaji sun fi sake karantawa?
Shin cibiyoyin fanni mai iya shiga index?

entries.source: Are the articles connected to live AI learning tools?
entries.value: Shin the kasidu connected don kai tsaye koyon kayan aikin AI?

entries.source: Are these pages saying inspir replaces every learning platform?
entries.value: Shin these shafuka faɗa inspir replaces kowane learning dandali?

entries.source: Are these pages written only for search engines?
entries.value: Shin these shafuka written only don injinan bincike?

entries.source: Are these prompts just for ChatGPT?
entries.value: Shin these saƙonni just don ChatGPT?

entries.source: Are these real public pages or just app screens?
entries.value: Shin these real shafukan jama’a ko just manhaja screens?

entries.source: Are these workflows free to try?
entries.value: Shin these tsarukan aiki kyauta don gwada?

entries.source: Argue both sides and sharpen thinking
entries.value: Ka kare bangarorin biyu kuma ka kara kaifin tunani

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, and what makes an image powerful.
entries.value: Jagoran Fahimtar Fasaha yanayin koyo ne na AI mai mayar da hankali; ana amfani da AI don koyo maimakon tara amsoshi kawai. An gina yanayin a kan aiki takamaimai: Bincika artworks, styles, artists, na gani choices, da abin da makes an image powerful.

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Fahimtar fasaha jagora Yanayin Koyo na AI: jagora mai amfani

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide prompts and study loop
entries.value: Saƙonnin Jagoran Fahimtar Fasaha da madaukin karatu

entries.source: Articles, mode guides, and prompt loops
entries.value: Kasidu, mode jagorori, da madaukai na saƙo

entries.source: Ask about goals, deadlines, available time, and current confidence.
entries.value: Tambayi game da goals, deadlines, available lokaci, da na yanzu kwarin gwiwa.

entries.source: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Yi kowace tambaya kuma koyi ta hanyar bayani a sarari, misalai, tambayoyin biyo baya, da kuma koyarwar AI mai haƙuri.

entries.source: Ask audience, metric, risks, and how to include improvement.
entries.value: Tambayi masu amfani, metric, risks, da yadda don haɗa improvement.

entries.source: Ask Code Tutor for the simplest mental model, one example, and one thing beginners often misunderstand.
entries.value: Tambayi Lamba malami don the simplest tsarin tunani, one example, da one thing beginners often misunderstand.

entries.source: Ask current routine, target habit, and easiest daily version.
entries.value: Tambayi na yanzu tsari, target dabi’a, da easiest daily version.

entries.source: Ask follow-ups, evaluate accuracy and confidence, correct gaps, and retry.
entries.value: Tambayi follow-ups, tantance accuracy da kwarin gwiwa, correct gaps, da retry.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: Nemi a alama, have the mai koyo bayyana the na gaba mataki, sannan amfani da a tambayoyi ko katin tunatarwa don bincika whether the ra’ayi stuck.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, not the answer
Ask for a hint, question, or step check before the answer.
entries.value: Nemi a alama, tambaya, ko mataki bincika kafin the amsa.

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: Nemi a alama. kada a tambaya don the final amsa yet.

entries.source: Ask for a misconception check, a short retrieval question, or a harder example. Answer before asking the AI to correct you.
entries.value: Nemi a rashin fahimta bincika, a gajere retrieval tambaya, ko a mafi wuya example. amsa kafin asking the AI don correct kai.

entries.source: Ask for a simpler explanation of the weakest concept.
entries.value: Nemi bayani mafi sauki game da ra'ayin da ya fi rauni.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Nemi a small farko mataki rather fiye da a final amsa.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step.
Ask for a tiny first task.
Ask for a topic, level, or word list; then introduce a small set.
entries.value: Nemi a batu, mataki, ko word list; sannan introduce a small saita.

entries.source: Ask for artwork/style or provide a looking framework.
entries.value: Nemi artwork/style ko provide a looking framework.

entries.source: Ask for assignment names, due dates, effort, and current status.
entries.value: Nemi aiki names, due dates, effort, da na yanzu status.

entries.source: Ask for audience, goal, and draft status if unclear; then give focused feedback.
entries.value: Nemi masu amfani, goal, da daftari status if unclear; sannan give mai mayar da hankali martani.

entries.source: Ask for author, title, date, publisher, URL, and access date when needed.
entries.value: Nemi author, title, date, publisher, URL, da samun dama date lokacin da needed.

entries.source: Ask for available time, must-do tasks, and energy level.
entries.value: Nemi available lokaci, dole ne-do tasks, da energy mataki.

entries.source: Ask for commitment, partner/context, check-in frequency, and proof.
entries.value: Nemi commitment, partner/context, bincika-a cikin frequency, da proof.

entries.source: Ask for domain and difficulty, then set the case brief and first decision.
entries.value: Nemi domain da difficulty, sannan saita the case brief da farko decision.

entries.source: Ask for event and depth, then separate background causes from immediate triggers.
entries.value: Nemi event da depth, sannan separate background causes daga immediate triggers.

entries.source: Ask for exam date, syllabus, available time, and confidence by topic.
entries.value: Nemi exam date, syllabus, available lokaci, da kwarin gwiwa ta batu.

entries.source: Ask for five questions that mix definitions, examples, and transfer problems.
entries.value: Nemi tambayoyi biyar da suka hada ma'anoni, misalai, da matsalolin canja wuri.

entries.source: Ask for format, time limit, and audience; then begin a practice round.
entries.value: Nemi format, iyakacin lokaci, da masu amfani; sannan begin a atisaye round.

entries.source: Ask for goal, constraints, and desired vibe; then offer a varied idea set.
entries.value: Nemi goal, constraints, da desired vibe; sannan offer a varied ra’ayi saita.

entries.source: Ask for goal, timeline, tasks, and what counts as real progress.
entries.value: Nemi goal, timeline, tasks, da abin da counts as real ci gaba.

entries.source: Ask for grading scale, weights, current scores, and target.
entries.value: Nemi grading scale, weights, na yanzu scores, da target.

entries.source: Ask for group size, goal, duration, and check-in cadence.
entries.value: Nemi rukuni size, goal, duration, da bincika-a cikin cadence.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: Nemi alamomi, bincike, da martani kafin asking don a finished amsa.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, feedback, and study plans that keep the thinking with the learner.
entries.value: Nemi alamomi, dubawa, ra'ayi, da tsare-tsaren karatu da ke barin tunani a hannun mai koyo.

entries.source: Ask for language, goal, and code/error if relevant.
entries.value: Nemi harshe, goal, da lamba/error if relevant.

entries.source: Ask for language, learner level, and scenario; then start in character.
entries.value: Nemi harshe, mai koyo mataki, da scenario; sannan fara a cikin character.

entries.source: Ask for material, deadline, and prior confidence.
entries.value: Nemi material, wa’adi, da prior kwarin gwiwa.

entries.source: Ask for one revision priority, not a finished replacement.
entries.value: Nemi one bita priority, not a finished replacement.

entries.source: Ask for one small task before asking for the answer.
entries.value: Nemi one small task kafin asking don the amsa.

entries.source: Ask for one structural priority instead of a full rewrite.
entries.value: Nemi one structural priority maimakon a cikakke sake rubuta.

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: Nemi one-ra’ayi katuna tare da alamomi da na kowa traps.

entries.source: Ask for outcome, duration, distractions, and starting state.
entries.value: Nemi outcome, duration, distractions, da farawa state.

entries.source: Ask for place or theme, then orient with location, scale, and key features.
entries.value: Nemi place ko jigo, sannan orient tare da location, scale, da muhimmi features.

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: Nemi prerequisites, a mai sauƙi samfuri, examples, da a na kowa rashin fahimta.

entries.source: Ask for research goal, level, and available sources.
entries.value: Nemi bincike goal, mataki, da available tushe-tushe.

entries.source: Ask for role, audience, and background; then run a first question.
entries.value: Nemi role, masu amfani, da background; sannan run a farko tambaya.

entries.source: Ask for source material and pair type.
entries.value: Nemi tushe material da pair type.

entries.source: Ask for source material or topic and target difficulty.
entries.value: Nemi tushe material ko batu da target difficulty.

entries.source: Ask for source material, topic, and target detail if missing.
entries.value: Nemi tushe material, batu, da target detail if missing.

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: Nemi structure, shaida, da clarity martani while keeping the final daftari yours.
